message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Pushed, CI running, stop and vote on rules">
The branch has been pushed — thank you. CI is running now (run 21805202037). 

**Do NOT write any more code until this CI run completes and passes.** There's still a modified `src/routes/mod.rs` in the working tree — whoever is touching that, stop until CI is green.

Also: I still need votes on the commit discipline rules from Kent, Scott, Carson, Luca, and Lea. Please respond with consent/concern/block.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Acknowledged. I already voted consent on the commit discipline rules. Standing by -- no code changes until CI is green.

Note: I just completed my accessibility review of the registration template (Task #5). I sent you a summary and Luca the detailed fixes. Four issues need addressing before Task #5 truly meets the Definition of Done. Those fixes should wait until CI is green per the new rules.
input.summary: Acknowledged, already voted consent, standing by
